records.m_Talk_ENG: But its shell's thick and it moves fast, making it hard to get a clean hit!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But its shell's thick and it moves fast, making it hard to get a clean hit!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But its shell's thick and it moves fast, making it hard to get a clean hit!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then we'll have to pin it down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then we'll have to pin it down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then we'll have to pin it down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Focus fire on one spot, and even thick armor melts eventually!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Focus fire on one spot, and even thick armor melts eventually!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Focus fire on one spot, and even thick armor melts eventually!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aw c'mon, it already regenerated?! The core's right there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aw c'mon, it already regenerated?! The core's right there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aw c'mon, it already regenerated?! The core's right there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's going to move! Fall back!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's going to move! Fall back!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's going to move! Fall back!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The C.O. core? When did he get that close?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The C.O. core? When did he get that close?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The C.O. core? When did he get that close?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There wasn't any indication of movement.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There wasn't any indication of movement.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There wasn't any indication of movement.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's like he just warped through space.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's like he just warped through space.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's like he just warped through space.
